description: Google Play Games Services provides game-related features such as achievements, leaderboards, player data, and game configuration on Google Play. It also includes developer-facing APIs for configuring and managing those game services.
summary: gameservices.googleapis.com exposes three OAuth-authenticated REST APIs for Google Play Games: the player/game services API, the publishing/configuration API, and the management API.

surfaces.name: Google Play Game Services Publishing API
Google Play Game Services Management API
